mapper.sql: id, user_id, session_id, question_id, audio_url, transcript, fluency_and_coherence, lexical_resource, grammatical_range_and_accuracy, pronunciation, overall_score, feedback, answer_status, created_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO speaking_record ( user_id, session_id, question_id, audio_url, transcript, fluency_and_coherence, lexical_resource, grammatical_range_and_accuracy, pronunciation, relevance_comment, quality_comment, overall_score, feedback, answer_status, created_time, updated_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{questionId}, #{audioUrl}, #{transcript}, #{fluencyAndCoherence}, #{lexicalResource}, #{grammaticalRangeAndAccuracy}, #{pronunciation}, #{relevanceComment}, #{qualityComment}, #{overallScore}, #{feedback}, #{answerStatus}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM speaking_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM speaking_record WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE speaking_record SET user_id = #{userId}, session_id = #{sessionId}, question_id = #{questionId}, audio_url = #{audioUrl}, transcript = #{transcript}, fluency_and_coherence = #{fluencyAndCoherence}, lexical_resource = #{lexicalResource}, grammatical_range_and_accuracy = #{grammaticalRangeAndAccuracy}, pronunciation = #{pronunciation}, relevance_comment = #{relevanceComment}, quality_comment = #{qualityComment}, overall_score = #{overallScore}, feedback = #{feedback}, answer_status = #{answerStatus}, created_time = #{createdTime}, updated_time = #{updatedTime} WHERE id = #{id}
